question.label: Self-read opener
question.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
question.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

assessment.note: The response 'Yeah its fine' provides no substantive engagement or clarity signal.

new_queue.label: Current challenges
new_queue.name: What feels unclear or heavier than it should right now?

new_queue.label: Punctuality impact
new_queue.name: How do you think your punctuality affects the team or project timelines?

new_queue.label: Design impact
new_queue.name: How do you see your design work influencing the team's success?

new_queue.label: Communication clarity
new_queue.name: Where do you find communication around your design work most challenging?

new_queue.label: Project ownership
new_queue.name: What does taking full ownership of a design project mean to you?

new_queue.label: Leadership growth
new_queue.name: What areas of design leadership do you want to develop further?

new_queue.label: Sustainable workload
new_queue.name: Does your current workload feel sustainable over the next few months?

new_queue.label: Engagement level
new_queue.name: What aspects of your work are most engaging to you right now?
